characters.name: Amanda Luria
characters.description: Dr. Amanda Luria, SRU Psychologist Dr.Amanda Luriaserves in the SRU as the unit's psychologist, specializing in the psychology of violent criminals. She only appears in some of Season 1's episodes and her absence is not explained.

characters.name: Amanda Luria
characters.description: Dr. Amanda Luria, SRU Psychologist Dr.Amanda Luriaserves in the SRU as the unit's psychologist, specializing in the psychology of violent criminals. She only appears in some of Season 1's episodes and her absence is not explained.

characters.name: Andrew Kovacs
characters.description: Andrew Kovacsappeared inBehind The Blue Line. He was the father ofDarren Kovacsand a former soldier. Andrew appeared afterConstableJulianna Callaghanmanaged to track him down. He was driving and talking on his phone, telling Jules Darren would not get any psychiatric help. He also told Jules that Darren never understood that people had high expectations around him but just worked extremely hard. He corroboratedMax Dykstra's story that Darren looked shocked when he returned home from his tour in Afghanistan. Andrew added that Darren would not talk to anyone and started drinking and picking fights with people he  did not know. Andrew revealed himself and his father before him served in the army. He initially wasn't in agreement when he heard Darren wanted to serve. After recalling he told his son he must make his own choices, he knew he couldn't stop Darren joining. He told Jules Darren was deployed to Kandahar. As Max identified the soldiers in the photograph Team One found, Andrew remarked that they all meant everything to Darren. He answered Jules that those friends of Darren were killed by an Improvised Explosive Device (IED). Andrew further told Jules that after the blast, Darren was sent back before his tour was up. Darren tried to apply to return to the forces but was denied and never told his dad the reason why, just told Andrew he's a good soldier. Andrew suspected the army would not accept him back. Jules confirmed that Andrew was of Hungarian heritiage but he didn't know what 'SYOTOS' meant - a phrase Darren wrote on  the photogragh. After Ed shot Darren, Andrew was extremely emotional and tried to ask the guarding officers to let him in but was denied. Towards the end, it was shown that Andrew stared at the photograph of Darren and his friends, sitting of an bench in the Coliseum.

characters.name: Anson Holt
characters.description: Anson Holt was a character who appeared inKeep The Peace, Part Iand flashbacks inKeep The Peace, Part II.

characters.name: Barney Fletcher
characters.description: Barney Fletcheris a retiring SRU Officer who appeared towards the end ofScorpio. Edwas arguing with his wife,Sophiethat he truly needed to attend Barney's retirement party. Sophie reminded him he knew it was her parent's fortieth. They argued but Ed left withWordysinging an incorrect verse of Gilbert and Sullivan's "The Pirates of Penzance". After completing an SIU interview, Ed was late for the party. Barney announced, "Mr. Lane. You better have an outstanding reason for being late." While not appearing inHaunting the Barn, Ed toldSamBarney andDaniel Rangfordbrought him into the SRU.

characters.name: Ben (Jacob Richter)
characters.description: Ben Mendelis a male SRU dispatcher featured only in the episode Priority of Life.

characters.name: Bill James
characters.description: Bill Jamesalso known asMr. Jamesappeared only inKeep the Peace, Part 2. He is the father ofTony James. After his son Tony couldn't continue his account of his treatment underMarcus Faberand broke down, Bill continued the account for Jules. Bill said he found Tony in his university residence and Tony was taking sleeping pills. He took Tony home and got Tony to reveal what exactly happened. Bill talked to a lawyer and the other parents of the Marcus' students and tried to get a lawsuit going. However, the university instead paid all victims a large on condition they do not reveal their story.

characters.name: Billy Dresden
characters.description: Billy Dresdenis a teenager who has a history of getting bullied at school. He is close friends with Ella With whom he had a crush on. He is also a good painter.

characters.name: Billy Dresden
characters.description: Billy Dresdenis a teenager who has a history of getting bullied at school. He is close friends with Ella With whom he had a crush on. He is also a good painter.

characters.name: Blair Kowalski
characters.description: Blair Kowalskiis aSpecial Investigation UnitOfficer or Agent who appears several times to investigateTeam One'slethal actions. Blair first appeared inScorpio, quickly entering the interview room and introducing himself to a shockedEd Lane. He requested theTeam Onesniper to remove his uniform. However,Frank McAndrewentered chided him for starting without a lawyer present. Blair asked testy questions such as "What exactly do you mean, 'he called scorpio'?" and asked why Ed used lethal force and ifPetar Tomasicwas made to involve in the negotiations. Frank however, answered and defended Ed aggressively. Blair curtly told Ed the rest of the SIU process, warned him he's still under investigation and advised to go spend time with his family.

characters.name: Businessman (Jonathan Monro)
characters.description: A Businessman appeared in a short scene inSccorpio. Goran Tomasicwas angrily arguing with his estranged wifeMarta Tomasic. She shouted "Please, someone!" The well-suited Businessman asked "Is everything okay?" Goran pointed his gun shouting "Go away!" and the Businessman apologised and left.

characters.name: Cabbie (Abdu Bedward)
characters.description: ACabbie, name unknown, appeared inScorpio. The cabbie picked upSam Braddockfrom the airport and initially was told to head to the main police station. He asked Sam if he minded the radio. The news of the hostage taking was on and Sam asked him to increase the volume. As the news continued, Sam asked him if he knew where it was. The Cabbie assured he wasn't driving near the area. Sam, not wishing to miss police action, asked him to head there. The Cabbie is of Middle Eastern descent.

characters.name: Catherine Graham
characters.description: Catherine Grahamwas the wife ofDavid Grahamand appeared inEagle Two.

characters.name: Charlie Howard
characters.description: Charlie Howardappeared inBehind the Blue Line. He was a former usher at the Godwin Coliseum from 1977 to 1998. SergeantGregory Parker's phone was stolen by a suspect and asConstablesSamandleahentered a narrow hidden passage from the VIP lounge, Sam was attacked with White Phosphorus. Greg quickly surmised the suspect knew the  layout of the Coliseum extremely well and was hiding a unspecified location.Julesfound Charlie who surmised the suspect was hiding in 'the bunker', where player Daniel Godwin would dress before a game. Charlie toldEdthe bunker wasn't on the map but near one of the twenty-four concession stands and only needed to walk by it to remember exactly where.Team One, minus Greg, Sam and Jules to Charlie in diamond formation with the former usher wearing a vest. The group with Charlie passed by one stand but he said it wasn't despite having a sign. Later, after seeing server uniforms, Charlie identified the bunker, with Ed instructing the others to get uniforms near the bunker and send Charlie back through a safe passage. Towards the end, Charlie was seem standing in the old arena, reminiscing about old times.

characters.name: Clark Lane
characters.description:
Clark isEdandSophie Lane's oldest child, andIsabel Lane's older brother.
. Clark often differs from his father. He likes playing the cello while Ed likes rock music. Clark is caught in the bombing at City Hall during "Keep the Peace". His father,Ed, finds him using the GPS on his phone and helps in bringing him to safety. Clark has a broken leg, wrist, and a lot of scratches, but is alright in the end. Clark often differs from his father. He likes playing the cello while Ed likes rock music. Clark is caught in the bombing at City Hall during "Keep the Peace". His father,Ed, finds him using the GPS on his phone and helps in bringing him to safety. Clark has a broken leg, wrist, and a lot of scratches, but is alright in the end.

characters.name: Clive Irwin
characters.description: Clive Irwinis an evil character who appears inTerror.

characters.name: Cop (Killian Gray)
characters.description: ThisCop,portrayed by Killian Gray, appeared inFirst In Line. This Cop saw thatJack Swansonwas speeding and pulled him over on the highway. He attempted to make Jack put his hands on Jack's truck. Jack shouted at the Cop, explaining why he was speeding. After hearing Jack's explanation, the cop went to check the backseat of the car, noticingPhoebe Swanson's state, After the cop realised the truth, he told Jack to follow his patrol car closely and brought the father and daughter to the hospital, carrying Phoebe's breathing gear.

characters.name: Daniel Rangford
characters.description: Daniel Rangfordis a character who appears inHaunting the Barn.

characters.name: Daniel Rangford
characters.description: Daniel Rangfordis a character who appears inHaunting the Barn.

characters.name: Darren Kovacs
characters.description: Darren talking to Sam. Darren Kovacsis a character who appears inBehind The Blue Line. He is a former soldier and excellent hockey player. A character uncredited asSuitand another character credited asDemolition Expertwere talking about dynamiting the Godwin Coliseum and the history of the building as they approached the arena. Before the pair could enter the arena, shot were fired, hitting Suit's leg. Some time later,Team Onearrived on the scene and the injured Suit kept protesting atSpikeandWordywho were trying to gain more information from him as to where the shots  came from. Just telling the pair to get inside to put his tax dollars to work, Spike removed the gauze bandage and ascertained the shots came from high.

characters.name: Darren Kovacs
characters.description: Darren talking to Sam. Darren Kovacsis a character who appears inBehind The Blue Line. He is a former soldier and excellent hockey player. characters.name: David Fleming
characters.description: David "Dave" Flemingis the former boyfriend ofNatalie Braddockand a criminal convicted of drug smuggling. Most of David Fleming's history is not clear but at some point, he met Natalie Braddock with the two beginning a romantic relationship, although it can be presumed that the relationship was one-sided. On their way home, both David and Natalie were caught with drugs in their luggage and as such, both wound up in a jail in Colombia. Although Natalie was eventually released due to her father who was a General, David was not so fortunate and remained in the jail for a prolonged amount of time where he was tortured with the effects of the torture leaving a permanent scar that lay beneath the right side of his stomach and just beside his bellybutton while David himself became emotionally and psychologically damaged. At some point, after spending ten months in jail, David was eventually freed from jail and returned to Canada a month prior to the events ofBlue On Bluealthough he was left consumed with a strong desire for revenge against Natalie. It is also presumed that at some point he did some digging into Natalie's past and discovered that she was now datingMike "Spike" Scarlatti, a member of Team One. David also formed a partnership withVince Albinwho had helped David get released from jail. At first, David appears to be a charming man but this is quickly revealed to be nothing than a façade as he is in fact a psychopathic, aggressive, impatient, cold-blooded, ruthless man hellbent on revenge and who also has little or no regard for human life which is demonstrated when he shoots his partner. In addition, David is so viciously haunted by his past that he is willing to go to great lengths to exact his revenge. He has no remorse for what he does and also tends to ignore anyone who tries to reason with him. He also displays a lack of patience which is seen when he viciously slaps Spike after an attempt to invade the Evidence Depot has gone incorrectly. David later shows alpha male or dominant behavior and does not tolerate being challenged or doubted.

characters.name: David Graham
characters.description: David Grahamappeared inEagle Twoand is a wealthy Philanthropist albeit with a secret. He is the husband ofCatherine Graham.

characters.name: Dean Parker
characters.description: Dean Parker as portrayed by Jack Knight. Dean ParkerisGregory Parker's son. He first appears in season 3 after Greg sues his estranged wife in a desperate attempt to see his son. While Dean initially intends to ask his father to drop the lawsuit and stop trying to contact him, he soon realizes the sacrifices his father makes and the importance of his job. As a result, Dean begins to visit his father more often, eventually coming to live with him and deciding to become a police officer himself. Dean is a serious, soft-spoken young man who takes after his father more than he initially realizes. He is highly empathetic, like his father, and is even described by Clark as a "human polygraph". He has a strong sense of justice and believes in doing "the right thing".

characters.name: Demolition Expert (Jeff Pustil)
characters.description: ADemolition Expertappeared at the start ofBehind the Blue Line.

characters.name: Detective (Paul Fauteux)
characters.description: ADetectiveappeared inScorpio. He was seen withInspector Staintonholding a loudhailer trying to communicate withGoran Tomasic. When they were unable to, they discussed what pistol Goran was carrying and noted it was a Luger. WhenSergeantGregory Parkercame up to the pair, the detective told Greg Goran spoke Yugoslavian or Croatian. Greg told the detective and Stainton to pull back to prevent unnecessary shooting atTeam One. Greg also needed an Croatian interpreter.

characters.name: Donna Sabine
characters.description: Donna Sabine Donna Sabinewas Jules' replacement after Jules took a temporary leave of absence to recover from the gunshot wound she takes in S1 finale, "Between Heartbeats". A former undercover narcotics agent wishing to get rid of her "mask", Donna transferred to SRU's Team 3 upon Jules' return. She appeared in six Season 2 episodes: "Business As Usual", "The Fortress", "Clean Hands", "Aisle 13", "The Perfect Family", and "Remote Control".

characters.name: Donna Sabine
characters.description: Donna Sabine Donna Sabinewas Jules' replacement after Jules took a temporary leave of absence to recover from the gunshot wound she takes in S1 finale, "Between Heartbeats". A former undercover narcotics agent wishing to get rid of her "mask", Donna transferred to SRU's Team 3 upon Jules' return. She appeared in six Season 2 episodes: "Business As Usual", "The Fortress", "Clean Hands", "Aisle 13", "The Perfect Family", and "Remote Control".

characters.name: Ed Lane
characters.description: Constable Ed Lane, SRU: Team One Edward Tucker 'Ed' Lanewas theTeam LeaderofSRU: Team Oneuntil his promotion toSergeantinEpisode:Keep The Peace, Part II. The veteran of the Strategic Response Unit team, Ed's other speciality is that of a sniper. He has some problems with his wife of fifteen years,Sophie, and sonClarkdue to the nature of his job, and the fact that he is strongly attached to his SRU colleagues. For example, he once deliberately missed the anniversary of his in-laws for work. Since season 4, he also has a daughterIsabel.

characters.name: Ed Lane
characters.description: Constable Ed Lane, SRU: Team One Edward Tucker 'Ed' Lanewas theTeam LeaderofSRU: Team Oneuntil his promotion toSergeantinEpisode:Keep The Peace, Part II. characters.name: Elaine Stearns
characters.description: Elaine in her hotel room. Elaine Stearnsappeared inThrough A Glass Darkly. She is the estranged mother ofSue Fullerand grandmother ofJess Fuller. There is not much background information on Elaine in the episode except that she is wealthy and her husband Frank passed away. Elaine suffered from Alzheimer's and previously hiredTyler Hewittwho worked in most likely her family's company business and security. Because of her illness, she did not realise that Tyler was taking advantage of her.

characters.name: Elaine Stearns
characters.description: Elaine in her hotel room. Elaine Stearnsappeared inThrough A Glass Darkly. She is the estranged mother ofSue Fullerand grandmother ofJess Fuller. characters.name: Elderly Neighbor (Martin O'Carrigan)
characters.description: AnElderly Neighborappeared inThrough A Glass Darkly. AsSue Fulleryelled for him to call the police, he did so. He identified the getaway vehicle at Bathurst and Harbord as a 'late model blue van' and could only partially identify the licence prints as starting with 'AZ' and ending with 'zero'. LaterSergeantGregory ParkerandConstableJulianna Callaghaninterviewed him, learning that vehicles park there often. They block his property and he keeps watch of the vehicles but whenJess Fullerwalked out the abduction happened fast, telling Greg and Jules they were expecting Jess. He further informed the toTeam Oneofficers he did not know the Fuller's well but Jess walked through the alley after school.

characters.name: First Responding Officer (Andrew Musselman)
characters.description: AFirst Responding Officerappeared inFirst In Line. AfterJack Swansonwas increasingly angry and shouting that his daughterPhoebe Swansonwould not receive the heart transplant, theSecurity Guardescorted him out but Jack immediately grabbed the sidearm from this First Responding Officer, pointing the weapon at him. Later, this First Responding Officer regrettably toldTeam Onewhat happened, gave them floor plans and briefed them on the number of people around the ward and surgical theatre. The character should not be mistaken with the Security Guard.

characters.name: Frank McAndrew
characters.description: Frank McAndrewis a minor recurring character inFlashpoint. He'sEd Lane's lawyer. InScorpio, Frank barged in the interview room scoldingBlair KowalskitheSpecial Investigation Unitofficer for starting the interview without him. He told Ed not to say anything to the SIU officer. With Ed clearly in shock, Frank answered most of Kowalski's questions, defending Ed extremely aggressively as he promised. Kowalski asked why lethal force was used, Frank got Ed to show the 'Force Wheel.' Frank is depicted as a caring lawyer, allowing Ed to take the call from [[Sophie Lane|his wife]. He also advised Ed to talk to Dr.Amanda Luria.

characters.name: Frank McCormick
characters.description: Frank McCormickappeared inCollateral Damage. He was charged with child-slaughter after his baby daughter, Taylor, was confirmed to have died from shaken baby syndrome. Though he defended himself in court, the lead prosecutor pressed his wife Kerry into admitting that he may have been responsible. As he was being transported back to prison, the prison truck is attacked to free a fellow convict. Rather than join the crooks, Frank chose to go back home and confront Kerry. He then took her to the coroner office, to confront Dr. Roberta Fenton and have the autopsy files looked at to prove his innocence. But asEd Lanetried to talk him down, Frank admitted that when he got home from a business trip, he gave his daughter the normal dosage, but she kept crying. Sometime later, she was silent. Though Kerry and Fenton insisted that it could've been an accident, Frank couldn't accept it. But before he could commit suicide, Sam dropped a flash grenade through the vent, giving Ed an opening to disarm and arrest Frank. Frank was later proven innocent, as Dr. Valo, whom Frank insisted work with Fenton to double check the autopsy for a second opinion, revealed that his daughter actually died of an ear infection, through use of a test that Fenton refrained from using.

characters.name: George Orston
characters.description: George Orstonwas a former CCB worker and had a relationship withMary Orston.

characters.name: George Orston
characters.description: George Orstonwas a former CCB worker and had a relationship withMary Orston.

characters.name: Gerald Duglin
characters.description: Gerald Duglinis a character who appears inPlanets Aligned. He kidnappedPenny Westlerwhen she was10 years oldand later kidnappedLilly Deacon.

characters.name: Girl One (Zoi Samonas)
characters.description: A teenaged girl, uncredited asGirl Oneappeared inThrough A Glass Darkly. Girl One was walking withGirl Two (Asha Bromfield)when they foundJess Fuller's cell phone and it was ringing. Picking it up, she answered "Hello?" When when one ofTeam One's vehicle reach them andConstableEd Lanequeried where they exactly found it. Girl Two told Ed it was exactly at the spot they stopped at.

characters.name: Girl Two (Asha Bromfield)
characters.description: A girl, uncredited asGirl Teoappeared inThrough A Glass Darkly. Girl Teo was walking withGirl Onewhen they foundJess Fuller's cell phone and it was ringing. Girl One picked it up and answered "Hello?" When when one ofTeam One's vehicle reach them andConstableEd Lanequeried where they exactly found it. Girl Two told Ed it was exactly at the spot they stopped at.

characters.name: Goran Tomasic
characters.description: Goran Tomasicis a character who appears in the pilot episodeScorpio. He was finally seen in archive footage inBetween Heartbeats. Goran was first seen on a subway conversing with his sonPetar Tomasic. They hugged before Petar disembarked. Later, Goran entered Fist York Plaza and approached his wifeMarta Tomasic. It was clear that they were estranged and Marta previously called the police on him. He kept on wishing to reunited with her, increasing his temper which attracted the attention of theBusinessman. As Marta tried to walk away, he shot her. Goran held his arm hiding his weapon untilConstableNeville (Mike Turner)Nevilleturn and pointed his Glock 17 at Goran and Goran immediately grabbed the nearby lady and she was instantly his hostageHostage (Stephanie Morgenstern)and bolted away. Neville radioed andTeam Onewas called to the scene. Inspector Staintonand aDetectivewere seen trying communicate with Goran but he did not speak a word of English. The detective toldSergeantGregory Parkerthat it was a Yugoslavian language, particularly Croatian and Greg requested for a Croatian interpreter. Goran became more engaged pointing his weapon at the hostage then Greg,WordyandSpike.Jules'sniper position was blocked butEdsoon got aScorpioposition untilPetar Tomasicarrived.Roliegrabbed him but Petar could not help deescalate his father. Ed shot Goran upon Greg's order but simultaneously Petar broke free and rushed towards Goran, creating a 'Flashpoint' for Ed.

characters.name: Gregory Parker
characters.description: Sgt. Parker Gregory "Greg" Parkerwas the Sergeant for Team One, meaning that he is the overall leader of the group and can overrule anyone on the team. A recurring theme with him is that he always tells his team to "keep the peace" before heading out to a call. Prior to joining Team One as Sergeant, Greg was a homicide detective - a fact that comes to haunt him in select episodes. Parker's unconditional passion for his work burned out his relationship with his wife, and he turned to heavy drinking, and aggression he couldn't control. When she left, she took their son,Dean, with her and Parker hit rock bottom. In one episode, he regrets not keeping in touch with his son and decides to call him up. Later inJumping At Shadows, Dean shows up at the station and the two reconnect.

characters.name: Guard (Jonathan Goldapple)
characters.description: AGuardappeared in Behind the Blue Line although uncredited.

characters.name: Hank Gerald
characters.description: This article or section needs to be improved to conform to a higher standard of article quality. Please follow the guidelines in theFlashpoint Wiki:Manual of Styleand improve this article to the highest level of quality.  Hank Geraldwas introduced in the Season 4 episodeA New Life, where he marriesDonna Sabine. As Ed walks her down the aisle at the outdoor ceremony, Donna reveals to him that she was the one to ask Hank to marry her.

characters.name: Harlan Geddes
characters.description: Harlan Geddesis a character who appeared inThe Element of Surprise.

characters.name: Harlan Geddes
characters.description: Harlan Geddesis a character who appeared inThe Element of Surprise.
